concerns.text: Integration test T020 (end‑to‑end US1) is listed before the verification task T042 that it relies on. Consumer (test) precedes producer (size verification), violating producer‑before‑consumer ordering.

Task T043 (abort on insufficient GEO samples) modifies downloader behavior but is placed after T042 and the related unit/integration tests (T069, T019). Tests that expect the abort behavior run before the behavior is implemented.

Integration test T030 (US3 end‑to‑end) appears before the CI verification step T044 that checks GO‑enrichment FDR compliance. The test should consume the verification output, so T044 must precede T030.

CI verification step T045 (evaluation metric thresholds) is listed after the integration test T026 that already asserts those thresholds. While not a strict dependency, placing verification before the test would make the test suite more logically ordered.
